item.title: 0.19.0-beta.5
item.description:
## What's Changed
- Skip Icon Composer source in release build (#57) by @AmElmo - Use web Apple OAuth for Developer ID releases (#56) by @AmElmo - Use Swift 6.2-capable Xcode for releases (#54) by @AmElmo - Fix release workflow Metal toolchain setup (#53) by @AmElmo - Update new task sidebar and chat canvas (#52) by @AmElmo - Add screenshot seed data workflow (#51) by @AmElmo - Update onboarding welcome copy (#50) by @AmElmo - Adopt three-triangles Darius brand mark (#49) by @AmElmo - DAR-13: Apple Liquid Glass main-shell UI skin (#48) by @AmElmo - Polish settings UI look and feel (#46) by @AmElmo - Add three-triangles and sunset logo proposals (#47) by @AmElmo - Add menu bar quick ask panel (#45) by @AmElmo - DAR-16: Add mandatory Supabase sign-in (#44) by @AmElmo - Archive Penrose logo proposals for future reference (#43) by @AmElmo - DAR-12: clean up settings UI (#41) by @AmElmo - Update voice model selection docs (#42) by @AmElmo - Add Apple Liquid Glass v3 + v4 UI variations (composer gradient, floating panels) (#40) by @AmElmo - Add four shortlisted UI variations of studio-r6 (Linear, Apple, Things, Craft) (#39) by @AmElmo - Harden folder and artifact trust boundaries (DAR-39) (#37) by @AmElmo - Document Osaurus upstream intake workflow (#38) by @AmElmo - Rewrite README around new positioning and internal team (#36) by @AmElmo - Wire CI/CD release pipeline to Darius infrastructure (DAR-7) (#34) by @AmElmo - Restore Darius-owned sandbox infra URLs + upstream-intake guardrail (#35) by @AmElmo - Unify chat and folder-backed work execution (#33) by @AmElmo - Document unified-Task model + add main UI mockup (round 6) (#32) by @AmElmo - Open menu recents in current chat (#30) by @AmElmo - Document voice model selection (DAR-42) and Linear wave conventions (#31) by @AmElmo - Add Light / Dark / System appearance toggle to Settings (#28) by @AmElmo - Backport upstream reliability fixes (#29) by @AmElmo - Update Darius menu mark rounding (#27) by @AmElmo - Add UI catalog and fix catalog cell reuse (#26) by @AmElmo - Use development signing for local app builds (#25) by @AmElmo - Soften prism with rounded outer edges (V2 r=10) (#24) by @AmElmo - Redesign menu bar widget (DAR-11) (#23) by @AmElmo - Replace homepage cloud-globe orb with shimmering Darius prism (#22) by @AmElmo - Wire Darius brand assets into the app (DAR-33) (#21) by @AmElmo - Bundle plugin catalog and binaries inside the app (DAR-31) (#20) by @AmElmo - Document Conductor cache cleanup (#19) by @AmElmo - Remove clipboard "Paste Content From [App]" chip (#18) by @AmElmo - Document onboarding \& default AI provider strategy (DAR-10) (#17) by @AmElmo - Mirror sandbox init.ext4 to AmElmo infrastructure (DAR-30) (#16) by @AmElmo - Fix pending tool call cell constraint conflict (#15) by @AmElmo - Add Darius brand identity (DAR-5) (#14) by @AmElmo - Fix agent harness tool usage reliability (DAR-8) (#13) by @AmElmo - Update About panel tagline and drop Dinoki Labs byline (#12) by @AmElmo - Curate local model list and drop OsaurusAI dependency (DAR-29) (#10) by @AmElmo - Document no-telemetry stance and scrub Osaurus references (DAR-6) (#11) by @AmElmo - Handle port collisions in the local server (#8) by @AmElmo - Comply with legal obligations and finish Darius rebrand (#9) by @AmElmo - Revise upstream sync strategy for Darius fork (#7) by @AmElmo - Finish Darius app branding and release naming (#6) by @AmElmo - Route PR macOS tests to self-hosted runner (DAR-27) (#5) by @AmElmo - Rebrand all user-facing Osaurus references to Darius (DAR-26) (#4) by @AmElmo - Remove outdated cursor rule and fix FluidAudio API breakage (#3) by @AmElmo - Add shared AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md for AI coding agents (#2) by @AmElmo - Fork Osaurus with upstream tracking (DAR-1) (#1) by @AmElmo
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/AmElmo/darius/compare/...0.1.0
